title: Booga's Variety Pack
description: Little bit of this, Little bit of that
body:
Booga's Variety Pack is a modpack that i compiled that has:

- Multiple vanilla friendly mods that include new armor types, waystones and wine

- Optimization to make it run better including Rubidium and Rubidium setting

- A whole new dimension accessed by making a portal with glowstone and water

Known bugs:

There are random times that chunks and items will just not appear\
**I dont know how to fix this**

The game will crash sometimes

If you have more mods that you think i should add or find any more errors please dm me at Booga#2800
